verses.text: In the last days the mountain of the LORD's house shall be exalted, and nations shall say, 'Come... he will teach us of his ways.' Gospel ingathering. The Word goes forth, and the peoples flow to God.

In the last days the mountain of the LORD's house shall be exalted, and nations shall say, 'Come... he will teach us of his ways.' Gospel ingathering. The Word goes forth, and the peoples flow to God.
He shall judge among many, and they shall beat 'swords into plowshares,' each man at peace under his vine. Reign of peace. Where Christ rules, war gives way to safety and rest.
He shall judge among many, and they shall beat 'swords into plowshares,' each man at peace under his vine. Reign of peace. Where Christ rules, war gives way to safety and rest.
Though others walk after their gods, we will walk in the name of the LORD; He will gather the lame and reign over them. A faithful remnant. God makes the weak and outcast His own.
Though others walk after their gods, we will walk in the name of the LORD; He will gather the lame and reign over them. A faithful remnant. God makes the weak and outcast His own.
Though others walk after their gods, we will walk in the name of the LORD; He will gather the lame and reign over them. A faithful remnant. God makes the weak and outcast His own.
The kingdom shall come to Zion; she must yet go to Babylon, 'but there shalt thou be delivered.' Exile then rescue. The path to deliverance passes through chastening.
The kingdom shall come to Zion; she must yet go to Babylon, 'but there shalt thou be delivered.' Exile then rescue. The path to deliverance passes through chastening.
The kingdom shall come to Zion; she must yet go to Babylon, 'but there shalt thou be delivered.' Exile then rescue. The path to deliverance passes through chastening.
Nations gather against her, not knowing the LORD's thoughts, who gathers them as sheaves to be threshed. Hidden purpose. The enemies who assemble only fulfil God's plan for their defeat.
